title: AI Video Editor — Direct Response Ads + AI UGC
description:
We're a DTC e-commerce brand hiring an AI Video Editor to produce direct response ad creative for our paid social on Meta and TikTok. This is ongoing, long-term work — we ship multiple ad variants per week and need someone who can keep pace.

This is not a "polish the brand video" role. It's a "ship five testable variants of three concepts by Friday" role. We test creative aggressively, scale what works, and move fast.

You need a strong working knowledge of direct response video editing — hooks that stop the scroll, pacing that holds attention, pattern interrupts, visible captions, clear CTAs, and the editing instincts that separate an ad that converts from one that just looks nice. If you've spent years cutting cinematic brand films but have never edited an ad designed to drive a purchase, this isn't the role.

You'll be working closely with our Creative Strategist, who owns the briefs, angles, and concepts. Your job is to translate those briefs into finished ad creative — which means you need to be able to flex your editing style to match the brief, not impose a single signature look on everything you touch. Different concepts call for different pacing, tone, and aesthetic, and we need an editor who reads a brief and adapts.

What you'll do



Work directly with our Creative Strategist on briefs, scripts, and concept direction

Adjust your editing style — pacing, tone, visual treatment — to match each brief

Apply direct response editing principles to every cut: strong hooks, retention-focused pacing, clear CTAs

Generate AI video using Kling 3.0, Higgsfield, Veo 3, Runway, and Pika

Build storyboards and shot lists from scripts and briefs before generating

Edit, caption, and master finished ads in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

Generate and edit images using Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image), Midjourney, and Flux

Add captions, text overlays, sound design, and music

Iterate based on Meta Ads Manager performance — hook rate, hold rate, CTR



Required experience



2+ years editing direct response video ads for DTC e-commerce brands

Strong working knowledge of direct response video editing principles — hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts, captions, CTAs

Demonstrable portfolio of AI UGC ads you've shipped at spend (not spec work)

Recent, hands-on experience with Kling 3.0, Higgsfield, and Nano Banana

Working knowledge of Veo 3, Runway, ElevenLabs

Pro proficiency in CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

Proven ability to adapt your editing style to different briefs and concepts (please show range in your portfolio)

Solid understanding of Meta and TikTok ad creative best practices and current platform specs

Strong written English and reliable communication — you'll be in regular contact with the Creative Strategist



Nice to have



Motion graphics / 2D animation in After Effects

Voice cloning workflows with ElevenLabs

Worked with brands spending $50k+/month on Meta



To apply, please do all of the following — applications missing any of these will be ignored:



Start your message with the word "BANANA" so we know you've read this in full

Send 2–3 links to AI UGC ads you've shipped for DTC brands (ideally ads that ran at spend on Meta or TikTok) — bonus points if they show range across different styles

List the AI video and image tools you've actively used in the last 90 days, and what you used each one for

State your hourly rate and weekly availability

One line on your fastest brief-to-finished-ad turnaround



Generic AI-written cover letters will be rejected. Show us the work.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay



Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow, and develop their careers

TO BE RESPECTFUL OF YOUR TIME, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THE JOB REQUIREMENTS. We evaluate against these requirements strictly. If you do not have the requisite experience, please do not apply.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for an energetic and detail-oriented individual with extensive experience managing customer order flow to join our growing team. As an Order Management Specialist, you will be responsible for processing customer orders and coordinating fulfillment logistics. The ultimate goal is to ensure that customer orders are processed efficiently, accurately and on-time.



As an Order Management Specialist, you will work as a member of our company’s Operations team. To be successful at the role, the ideal candidate must have strong customer service, communication and interpersonal skills. You will work closely with our internal team and our customers (via
 and phone) to fulfill their orders. You can expect to learn a lot about how our business functions, be professionally challenged and have plenty of opportunities for career development!



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who will stay and grow at our company! Please apply if you have full-time availability and can commit to a long-term, mutually beneficial role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Bring in customer orders daily from various sources, including customer portals, EDI,
s and faxes

- Respond to incoming
s and phone calls with same-day service

- Confirm purchase order changes and make changes to orders in our ERP system

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions/conversations/issues (through Front and Airtable)

- Release orders/backorders for shipping in a timely fashion

- Organize order releasing for easy picking and communicate with our Warehouse team for shipment alignment

- Create delivery slips and invoice shipped orders

- Upload/enter shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Create, send inventory, shipping and invoicing EDI documents

- Handle payment issues, solve order-related problems and interact with account managers as needed

- Interact with customers and provide them with information on order-related questions (such as inventory availability) and product inquiries

- Understand and ensure departmental KPIs, objectives, and guidelines are followed

- Ensure customer SLAs are followed

- Work on other duties as assigned



WHO YOU ARE

- A Bachelor's Degree

- 1-3 years experience with order management, data entry and customer service

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills; additionally, strong interpersonal skills, particularly in a customer-facing capacity

- EDI experience

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong organizational skills; self-motivated and proactive

- MS Excel ability

- Excellent English skills

- Ability to work with our US team via
, Slack and Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion

- Positive, kind and easy to work with

- A team player mentality - one team, one dream!

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

title: Chemist
description:
About Us:



We are a forward-thinking adhesives manufacturer dedicated to innovation  and compliance. To support our growing operations, we are seeking a detail-oriented Chemist to join our technical team for a remote role of taking care of compliance requests from our customers.



Hourly rate $6 with part time 5-20 hours per week depending on availability of successful applicant. 



Role Overview:

The Chemist will be responsible for preparing and maintaining technical documentation (TDS, MSDS, and compliance statements, non conformances), ensuring product quality standards, and supporting regulatory compliance. The role combines laboratory oversight with documentation excellence to ensure our products meet both customer and legal requirements.



Key Responsibilities:



Author, update, and manage Technical Data Sheets (TDS), Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS/SDS), and product compliance statements.

Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory standards (e.g., REACH, CLP, OSHA, GHS).

Oversee Quality Control (QC) processes, including product testing, verification, and troubleshooting.

Collaborate with R&D, production, and compliance teams to ensure accurate product information.

Provide technical support to customers and internal stakeholders.

Monitor and maintain laboratory equipment and QC records.



Qualifications & Experience:



Minimum of a Degree in Chemistry  

ideally experience in formulating either inks, adhesives or similar product.

Strong knowledge of chemical regulations and safety standards.

Experience in writing and managing technical documentation (TDS, SDS, compliance statements).

at least 5 years Hands-on QC/laboratory experience

Excellent attention to detail, organization, and communication skills.



How to Apply: Please send a short video clip of 2-3 minutes outlining your relevant experience for this job and why you think you are a strong fit for this role

title: Order Management Lead - Remote Based
description:
APPLY HERE: https://airtable(dot)com/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pag8APoI3f6NCl7mv/form

NOTE: Change the word "(dot)" to an actual dot.



Job Description



We're seeking a highly capable and proactive Operations Lead to join our dynamic team at HiEnd Accents. This role is critical in ensuring seamless order management and operational excellence across our organization. The ideal candidate will be a problem-solver with strong leadership skills and a track record of driving operational efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Oversee and optimize the entire order management process, from intake to fulfillment, including:

• Bringing in customer orders from various sources (portals, EDI,
s, faxes)

• Confirming and making changes to orders in the ERP system

• Releasing orders/backorders for shipping and organizing for easy picking

• Creating delivery slips, invoicing shipped orders, and managing EDI documents

• Uploading shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Lead and mentor the Order Management team, driving accountability and ensuring KPIs and SLAs are consistently met or exceeded.

- Manage key accounts with complex requirements, ensuring high customer satisfaction through:

• Responding to inquiries with same-day service

• Handling payment issues and order-related problems

• Providing information on inventory availability and product inquiries

• Phone outreach

- Proactively identify and resolve operational issues, developing and implementing solutions to prevent recurrence.

- Drive continuous improvement by:

• Analyzing operational data to identify trends and opportunities

• Collaborating cross-functionally to implement strategic changes

• Contributing to special projects aimed at improving performance and scalability

- Spearhead process documentation (SOP) creation, encompassing both refinement of existing procedures and development of new ones.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including customers, vendors, and internal teams.

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions, conversations, and issues using designated tools (e.g., Front and Airtable).

- Communicate effectively with the Warehouse team for shipment alignment.

- Perform other duties as assigned.



Who You Are



- A seasoned professional with 5+ years of experience in operations management, preferably in e-commerce or retail

- An experienced team manager

- Bachelor's degree in Business, Operations Management, or a related field

- Must have recent night shift (PH time) experience and be willing to report to work during CST hours

- Proven track record of contributing to team success and driving operational excellence

- Expert in order management systems, EDI, and inventory management

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights

- Excellent problem-solving skills with a solutions-oriented mindset

- Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple priorities

- Proficient in the MS Office suite, with advanced Excel skills

- Experience with ERP systems and process automation tools

- Experience with SAP is not a requirement, but definitely a plus



Why HiEnd Accents?



Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, is a committed professional, and a straight shooter, you'll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value. Our customers love our exceptional designs that span a diverse range of styles and our commitment to offering everyday luxury at accessible prices. We proudly serve a broad clientele, including department stores, furniture stores, boutique hotels, interior designers, and retail customers. HiEnd Accents is based in Irving, Texas. Learn more about our brands at www.hiendaccents.com and www.paseoroad.com

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: https://airtable(dot)com/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/paggMH4Jq6yuGPYAK/form

NOTE: Change the word "(dot)" to an actual dot.



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



More about us and our brands: 

Learn about our Philippines team: 
/hea-ph-team



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. Recognition on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the US reflects our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions matter, we want to hear from you.



Working at HiEnd Accents means you can expect:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people to ensure opportunities to learn, grow, and develop careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We hire based on culture and values, so you work with a team that is fun, talented, and committed

title: SEO Expert (AI-Driven Search & Content)
description:
We’re looking for a results-driven SEO Expert who understands both traditional search and the evolving AI-driven landscape. This role requires a balance of technical expertise, content strategy, and data analysis to drive measurable growth for our clients.



Responsibilities: 



- Develop and execute comprehensive SEO strategies aligned with client business goals and KPIs

- Conduct keyword research and search intent analysis (including AI-generated search trends and zero-click SERPs)

- Optimize website structure, landing pages, and content for both search engines and user experience

- Perform technical SEO audits (site speed, indexing, crawlability, schema, Core Web Vitals) and implement fixes

- Manage on-page and off-page SEO, including internal linking, content optimization, and authority building

- Create and optimize high-quality content, including blog posts, landing pages, and service/location hubs

- Leverage AI tools (e.g., content generation, SERP analysis, automation) to improve efficiency while maintaining content quality

- Monitor rankings, traffic, and conversions; provide actionable insights and recommendations

- Track and report performance using clear monthly, quarterly, and 6-month deliverables

- Stay updated with algorithm changes, AI search developments, and SEO best practices



Requirements: 



- 2+ years of hands-on SEO experience (agency experience preferred)

- Proven experience in both local and international SEO campaigns

- Strong understanding of modern search (Google updates, E-E-A-T, AI Overviews, semantic search)

- Experience with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar

- Proficiency in Google Analytics (GA4), Google Search Console, and reporting dashboards

- Solid understanding of technical SEO and website platforms (WordPress, Shopify, etc.)

- Experience using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Surfer, Clearscope, or similar) to support SEO workflows

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into strategy

- Excellent English writing and editing skills with attention to detail



Nice to have: 

- Experience with programmatic SEO or scalable content strategies

- Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, or JavaScript for SEO implementation

- Familiarity with CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) principles

- Experience managing multiple client accounts in a fast-paced environment



To start the application process, kindly fill out the form:

title: Meta Ads & GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
Meta Ads & GoHighLevel Specialist (Full Ownership Role)



We are a fast-growing marketing agency helping roofing companies generate consistent, high-quality jobs through Meta ads, lead generation systems, and automated sales processes.



We’re looking for a high-level operator to take full ownership of client results — not just run ads.



This is not a beginner or “task-based” role.

You will be responsible for the entire fulfilment pipeline.



Your Role (Full Ownership)



You will take complete responsibility for:



Launching, managing, and scaling Meta ad campaigns for service-based businesses (Mainly roofing companies)

Building and optimising GoHighLevel funnels, workflows, and automations

Improving lead quality, booking rates, and overall client ROI

Troubleshooting issues across ads, funnels, and CRM

Continuously improving our systems, not just maintaining them

Working closely with the founder to drive performance and scale results



You are not here to “run tasks” — you are here to own outcomes.



What We’re Looking For



You must:



Have strong experience with GoHighLevel (funnels, workflows, pipelines, automations)

Be able to build systems from scratch, not just use templates

Have proven experience running Meta ads for service-based businesses

Understand how to generate qualified leads, not just cheap leads

Be highly proactive and solution-oriented (you solve problems without being told)

Think in terms of ROI, cost per booked call, and revenue, not vanity metrics

Be organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple clients



Bonus (not required):



Experience working with roofing companies or home improvement niches

This Role Is NOT For You If:

You need constant instructions or supervision

You only know how to “boost posts” or follow basic ad strategies

You rely entirely on pre-built snapshots and cannot build your own systems

You avoid responsibility when results are poor



Compensation

$1,500 - $2,500 /month base salary

Performance-based bonuses (based on client results, retention, and growth)

Clear progression into a senior/lead role as we scale



Working Details

Location: Philippines

Hours: UK time (8:30am – 5:00pm)

Work directly with the founder and core team (ads + creative)



Growth Opportunity



We are scaling aggressively to 20–50 clients, and this role will evolve into:



Head of Fulfilment / Team Leader

Managing other media buyers and systems

Playing a key role in the company’s growth



How to Apply



To apply, include:



A short Loom video (2–5 mins) explaining:

Your experience with Meta ads + GoHighLevel

A campaign or system you’ve built that got strong results

Examples/screenshots of:

Ad account performance

GHL workflows or funnels you’ve built

Why you believe you’re a top 10% operator

title: App and Automations Developer
description:
About the Role 



We are looking for a talented and driven Full-Time Developer to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for building, testing, and maintaining software solutions across our technology stack. The ideal candidate is a proactive critical thinker who anticipates problems before they arise and consistently delivers efficient, well-documented solutions. You will work closely with stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into reliable, scalable systems. 



Key Responsibilities 



Design, develop, test, and deploy software applications and automated workflows. 



Proactively identify potential issues and propose efficient, well-reasoned solutions. 



Build and maintain integrations across Microsoft and third-party platforms. 



Validate solutions through thorough testing, QA processes, and peer review. 



Create and maintain clear technical documentation, process guides, and project timelines. 



Manage project milestones and communicate progress against deadlines. 



Collaborate with internal teams to gather requirements and define technical scope. 



Stay current with emerging technologies and evaluate their applicability to company needs. 



Microsoft Ecosystem Proficiency 



Candidates must demonstrate strong hands-on experience with Microsoft products, including: 



Microsoft Azure — cloud infrastructure, services, and deployments. 



Power Automate — workflow automation and process integration. 



Power Apps — custom business application development. 



Microsoft 365 — SharePoint, Teams, and related productivity tools. 



Additional Microsoft tools and services as relevant to project requirements. 



External & Third-Party Tools 



In addition to the Microsoft stack, the ideal candidate will have experience working with external platforms and applications, such as: 



REST APIs and webhook integrations. 



Third-party SaaS platforms and connector ecosystems. 



Version control systems (e.g., Git/GitHub/Azure DevOps). 



Database tools and query languages (e.g., SQL, Dataverse). 



Relevant scripting languages (e.g., Python, JavaScript, PowerShell). 



Qualifications 



Proven experience as a developer with a portfolio of published projects. 



Strong critical thinking and analytical problem-solving skills. 



Excellent written communication skills, including technical documentation and status reporting. 



Demonstrated ability to manage timelines, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines. 



Experience working both independently and collaboratively in a team environment. 



Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering quality work. 



Preferred Qualifications 



Microsoft certifications (e.g., Azure Developer Associate, Power Platform Developer). 



Experience with Agile or Scru
thodologies. 



Background in process improvement or workflow optimization. 



Location & Schedule 



This is a full-time position. Candidates must be available and working during Central Time Zone business hours.



Application Requirements:

Resume

Introduction Video: Please include a link to a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining your background and why you believe you are the best fit for this specific "problem-solver" role.

title: Reddit Account Creator & Infrastructure Operator
description:
About Us



We are a performance-based Reddit marketing agency building long-term Reddit infrastructure for client campaigns.



Our goal is not spam.

Our goal is safe, scalable, organic growth.



We are hiring a reliable, detail-oriented operator to build and maintain Reddit accounts the right way.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for:



• Creating new Reddit accounts

• Warming accounts naturally

• Leaving high-quality comments

• Maintaining account health

• Tracking all accounts properly



This is a long-term operational role.



We value speed, discipline, and consistency.



Responsibilities

1. Account Creation



Create Reddit accounts following internal SOP



Set up username, avatar, bio properly



Verify
 securely



Ensure accounts are created safely without triggering restrictions



2. Account Warming



Gradually build karma in a natural way



Join relevant subreddits



Engage in discussions organically



Avoid spammy or risky behavior



Follow daily warming schedule



3. Comment Engagement



Leave thoughtful, natural comments



Engage in real discussions



Follow tone and quality standards



Maintain human-like activity patterns



4. Account Maintenance



Monitor for bans or restrictions



Immediately report issues



Maintain clean and natural account history



Protect older accounts carefully



5. Tracking & Reporting



Maintain accurate Google Sheet tracker



Update:



Username



Creation date



Karma



Status



Notes



Submit daily progress update



What We Expect



Strong attention to detail



Good written English



Ability to follow SOP exactly



Patience and discipline



Understanding that safety > speed



Long-term mindset



Experience with Reddit is required.



Compensation



Fixed monthly salary



Long-term position



Growth opportunities as team expands



We are looking for someone stable and reliable, not short-term freelancers.

title: Sales Representative (Cold Calling, Lead Generation & Appointment Setter) – Cleaning Business
description:
Job Summary



We are seeking a proactive, reliable, and results-driven individual to support our *residential and commercial cleaning business*. This role focuses on *outbound cold calling, lead generation, inbound call handling, and scheduling walkthroughs and cleanings*.



The ideal candidate is organized, confident on the phone, sales-minded, and able to follow systems and instructions closely. If you have experience with cold calling, appointment setting, or lead generation—and enjoy helping a growing cleaning company—we’d love to hear from you.



This position starts *part-time*, with the opportunity to grow based on performance and business needs.



Key Responsibilities



- Make outbound cold calls to commercial businesses (healthcare facilities, offices, apartments, etc.)

- Follow provided call scripts and present current promotions when applicable

- Generate and qualify leads for both residential and commercial cleaning services

- Collect and verify
 addresses from interested prospects

- Schedule walkthroughs for commercial prospects when required

- Answer inbound calls promptly and professionally

- Send quotes and/or schedule residential clients using **BookingKoala**

- Follow up with leads via callbacks and

- Accurately update lead status (called, not interested, follow-up needed,
 sent, scheduled, etc.)

- Return missed inbound calls in a timely manner

- Keep all call activity organized, transparent, and up to date



Daily Expectations (Very Important) 



- Minimum of 90+ outbound calls per shift

- Calls must be made consistently, without long gaps between calls

- Research per lead should take no more than 2–3 minutes

- Honest and accurate reporting of calls made (call logs are monitored)

- Follow-up is just as important as calling —
s and callbacks are required

- This is an hourly role, so full productivity is expected during scheduled hours



Work Schedule



- Monday to Friday

- 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM EST

- Includes *one 30-minute unpaid break*

- 5.5 paid hours per day



Compensation



- $4 USD per hour

- Paid biweekly (every two weeks) based on total hours worked

- Commissions available 

- Performance-based bonuses

- Growth potential with increased hours and pay based on results and consistency



Requirements



- Fluent or advanced English (spoken)

- Proven experience with **cold calling or appointment setting** (required)

- Comfortable speaking with **US-based businesses and clients**

- Strong work ethic and excellent time management

- Ability to follow instructions and adapt to feedback

- Stable internet connection and quiet workspace

- Comfortable using CRMs, spreadsheets, or booking systems

- Ability to learn and use **BookingKoala** for quotes and scheduling



Preferred (Nice to Have)



- Experience in *lead generation* (big plus)

- Previous experience working with a *cleaning service or janitorial company*

- Understanding of *residential and/or commercial cleaning services*

- Experience calling healthcare facilities or commercial accounts

- Background in sales, appointment setting, or customer service

- Previous experience working with US clients



Additional Value



We would also love to hear about *other ways you could help the business grow*, such as:



- Improving follow-up or lead tracking processes

- Suggesting outreach or sales improvements

- Helping refine call scripts or workflows

title: Teach me how to make an online business
description:
I've tried several things in the last 12 months and I haven't had any luck. 

My goal is to make an online business that makes $1/week. 

I'd like it to be relatively hands off once it's running.

Once it starts making money and it runs almost on it's own then I'd like to scale it.



I'm pretty much open to anything but.. I own a barbershop, I know stuff in the beauty industry, I have a fairly wide range of business knowledge, but beauty is the field I know best. 



I don't mind some business start up costs.



When you apply tell me your ideas and what you'd do, then tell me why you're qualified as this makes it much easier for me.



My starting budget is $200CAD, but if you have a good idea with proof of concept I can go higher.

title: Data Analyst (No Experience Required)
description:

As part of this role, you will verify that business names and opening hours are correct. You will check that the distance from a starting point to an end destination is listed accurately, resulting in better user experiences.



With this job you can plan your days around this highly flexible working schedule, work weekends or late evenings, all from the comfort of your own office. The flexibility of our roles minimizes the impact on your daily routine. So, whether you are a student looking to earn as you learn, a retiree looking for a new challenge, a part
 time professional or a work from home parent, Peroptyx has the right role for you!



The Ideal Candidate



- Fluent in English

- Excellent research skills.

- Excellent local knowledge of your home country.

- Good understanding and general knowledge of the geography and culture of the Philippines.

- Analytical mindset.



Job Requirements



- Must be living in the Philippines for a minimum of 5 consecutive years.

- Must pass an online open-book exam that can verify your full understanding of the material and concepts.

- Must be willing to work a minimum of 10 hours and up to 20 hours per week depending on task availability.

- Good working knowledge of search engines, map applications and familiarity with social media platforms.

- Strong ability to learn, understand and apply multiple sets of different instructions.

- All work must be of an independent nature.



Technical requirements to perform the work:



Access to a laptop or computer which uses:

- Anti-virus solution that is kept up to date, with regular scans performed

- Only one member per household may apply

NB. All products should be provided at your own expense.



Benefits

· Work up to 20 hours per week.

· Earn a competitive rate of pay.

· Develop your research skills.

· Avoid the long commute.

· Work from the comfort of your home office.

· Enjoy the flexibility of setting your own working hours!



Apply through the link below:

connect.peroptyx.ai/tracking/code/jnuO55



This is a freelance, independent contractor position.

title: Notion Workspace Developer (One-Time Project)
description:
JOB TITLE: Notion Workspace Developer (One-Time Project)



OVERVIEW



I'm looking for an expert Notion developer to build a fully custom CEO dashboard and workspace for my business. This is a one-time project with a clear brief — I'm not looking for someone to figure things out as they go. I need someone who has done this before and can execute.



A detailed written brief will be provided upon hire. It includes the full database structure, page layouts, filter specs, a visual dark-mode mockup, and section-by-section instructions for every part of the build.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD



1. CEO Dashboard Homepage

A dark, modern homepage that serves as my daily command center. Six sections: today's top priorities, weekly focus, inbox/follow-ups, goals progress, business KPIs, and a brain dump. All sections are linked database views with pre-built filters.



2. Four Core Databases

Master Tasks DB, Goals DB, Inbox DB, and KPI Tracker DB. All properties, types, status options, and relations are pre-defined in the brief — you just need to build them correctly.



3. Five Business Sub-Pages

Each business gets its own page with linked database views, a pinned Google Drive folder link, and sections specific to that vertical:

- Trelleborg (corporate role) — 30/60/90 day plan, 1:1 log, learning tracker

- Q Lens (video business) — client pipeline, team section, GHL data snapshot, Google Sheets timesheet embed

- QRS Studio (recording studio) — artist roster, sync pipeline, event tracker, content calendar

- Real Estate — buyer pipeline, property shortlist, deal notes

- Personal — life admin, errands, recurring reminders



4. GHL (GoHighLevel) Integration — Q Lens Page Only

Connect GoHighLevel to Notion to auto-pull pipeline value and campaign performance data into the KPI Tracker and Q Lens page. Recommended approach is Zapier or 
. Must update automatically on a daily basis.



5. Google Drive + Google Sheets Embeds

Embed a Google Drive folder link on each of the five business pages. Embed a Google Sheets time tracking spreadsheet on the Q Lens page (tracks hours for two tea
mbers).



6. All Saved Views and Filters

Every view must be pre-built and labeled — board by status, filtered by business, high priority, this week, overdue, and delegated. The client should not need to set any of these up.



---



REQUIREMENTS



- Expert-level Notion skills — custom databases, linked views, relational properties, filters, gallery/board/table layouts

- Experience building dark-themed, mobile-optimized Notion workspaces

- Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — must understand pipelines and campaigns

- Ability to set up a GHL to Notion sync via Zapier or 

- Comfortable embedding Google Drive and Google Sheets inside Notion

- Strong attention to detail — the brief is specific and the build should match it



---



DELIVERABLES



- All 4 databases built with correct properties and options

- CEO dashboard homepage with all 6 blocks linked and filtered

- All 5 business sub-pages complete per the brief

- GHL to Notion KPI sync live and tested

title: Experienced Associate Brand Manager to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Role Overview



We're hiring  a Brand Manager Assistant  who will work directly under the Senior Brand Manager to execute day-to-day brand operations. This is a hands-on role focused on the “legwork” that drives performance: optimizing listings, managing keyword research, coordinating creative projects, and pulling actionable data.



If the Senior Brand Manager sets the playbook, the Associate Brand Manager runs the plays — ensuring everything gets executed on time, correctly, and at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

1. Listing Management & Optimization

Create, update, and fully optimize Amazon product listings (titles, bullets, descriptions, images, videos, A+ content).

Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to improve rankings and visibility.

Ensure all listings remain Rufus and Cosmos compliant with Amazon’s latest requirements.

Test content variations (A/B testing) to improve CTR and conversions.



2. Data Research & Analysis

Pull performance data from Amazon Seller Central and external tools (Data Dive, Helium 10, Jungle Scout).

Identify trends, keyword shifts, and competitor activity.

Provide actionable recommendations to the Senior Brand Manager to improve conversions, CTR, and sales velocity.



3. Cross-Team Collaboration

Work closely with the graphic design team to request, coordinate, and deliver images, infographics, and A+ creatives.

Partner with the marketing team to support product launches, promotions, and review-generation initiatives.

Ensure all projects are aligned with deadlines, strategy, and brand guidelines.



4. Conversion-Focused Execution

Continuously update and refine listings to improve conversion rates and customer engagement.

Maintain Amazon Brand Stores, A+ content, and ad creatives for consistency and performance.

Assist in preparing assets for influencer campaigns and external marketing pushes.



5. Project & Compliance Support

Own the administrative “heavy lifting” of flat files, bulk uploads, and catalog troubleshooting.

Flag compliance issues, unauthorized sellers, or listing errors for quick resolution.

Support market expansion efforts by preparing research and draft listings for new product opportunities.



Skills & Qualifications



2+ years experience in Amazon FBA operations, brand management, or digital marketing.

Proficient in Amazon Seller Central, flat files, listing creation, and troubleshooting.

Strong skills in SEO, keyword research, and listing optimization.

Data-driven mindset; confident in Google Sheets and reporting.

Strong communication skills to work cross-functionally with design, marketing, and operations teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and capable of managing multiple deadlines.



What Success Looks Like

Every listing across assigned brands is fully optimized, compliant, and performing.

Senior Brand Manager receives clear, accurate reports and recommendations.

Creative assets are delivered on time because you coordinated smoothly with design.



Product launches happen seamlessly with marketing and review strategies in place.

Conversions and rankings consistently improve due to your execution. If you feel you are the right fit, please respond to the job with the title " The Best Supporting Branding Manager Out There!"



Please respond directly to :

----------



Kind Regards,

Tam Ma

Co Founder

Prodigy Media

title: Donor Welcome Video Ambassador
description:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WHEN YOU APPLY, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO SEND YOUR UPDATED RESUME AND A SAMPLE VIDEO

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

At UP Fundraising, we believe every donor deserves to feel seen, appreciated, and connected to the cause they’ve chosen to support.



We partner with mission-driven charities across Canada and the U.S., helping organizations grow their impact through meaningful donor engagement, fundraising innovation, and thoughtful stewardship. Now, we’re looking for a confident and warm on-camera communicator to help us create memorable first impressions for new donors.



As a Donor Welcome Video Ambassador, you’ll record short, personalized welcome videos that thank new donors and help them feel connected to the mission behind their gift. Your voice, energy, and presence will play an important role in turning a simple donation into a meaningful relationship.



What You’ll Do:

You’ll record clear, warm, and engaging video welcome messages for donors who have recently supported one of our charity partners.

This role is ideal for someone comfortable on camera, speaks naturally and professionally, and understands the power of making people feel appreciated.



Your Responsibilities:

Record donor welcome videos with warmth, clarity, and confidence

Deliver provided scripts in a natural, conversational, and professional way

Create a positive first impression that reflects the heart of the charity’s mission

Maintain a bright, quiet, and visually clean recording setup

Complete assigned videos consistently and within weekly deadlines



Video Volume:

To start, you can expect approximately 60 to 80 videos per week, with the opportunity to increase to 100 to 120+ videos per week as the program grows.



We’d love to hear from you if you are:

Comfortable and confident speaking on camera

Warm, professional, and easy to understand

Reliable, consistent, and deadline-focused

Able to follow scripts while still sounding genuine and human

Equipped with a computer or laptop, stable internet connection, good lighting, and clear audio



Nice to Have:

Previous experience with video recording, content creation, hosting, presenting, or on-camera work is a plus, but not required.



Rate:

$2.00 per completed video



Why This Role Matters:

This is more than simply recording videos. You’ll be helping charities create 
nts of gratitude, connection, and trust with the people who support their mission.



Every video you record helps a donor feel valued.

Every message helps strengthen their relationship with the cause.

And every warm welcome helps turn generosity into long-term impact.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WHEN YOU APPLY, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO SEND YOUR UPDATED RESUME AND A SAMPLE VIDEO

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Digital Content & Design Specialist
description:
Digital Content & Design Specialist

Remote | Part-Time (25–30 hours/week, including minimum 4 hours/day during 9am–5pm EST)



About the Company

Southwick’s Zoo is New England’s Largest Zoo, welcoming hundreds of thousands of guests each year. In addition to the Zoo, our marketing department supports a family of destination brands including Galliford’s Restaurant & Tavern, Daniels Farmstead, and Wild Events, our weddings and private events brand.

Together, these brands create a dynamic, multi-experience destination encompassing wildlife, dining, events, and seasonal programming.



Position Overview

Southwick’s Zoo is seeking a creative and detail-oriented Digital Content & Design Specialist to support the execution of marketing initiatives across all brands. This role is primarily focused on graphic design and visual content creation, with additional responsibilities in
 marketing and digital content support, including basic video editing.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, visually creative, and comfortable working across multiple brands, balancing design production with marketing execution. Please include the word "Giraffe" in your application to show that you read the description carefully.



Key Responsibilities

Graphic Design & Visual Content (Primary Focus)

• Design marketing materials for both digital and print use, including signage, advertisements, promotional graphics, and event collateral

• Support brand consistency across all visual assets

• Assist with layout and design for marketing campaigns, seasonal promotions, and in-park signage

• Work with tools such as Adobe Photoshop (preferred) and/or similar design platforms

 Marketing & Digital Campaign Support (Secondary Focus)

• Assist in the creation, formatting, and scheduling of
 marketing campaigns

• Support
 list management and segmentation across multiple brands

• Contribute to campaign execution and performance tracking

• Maintain marketing calendars and assist with campaign coordination

Website & Content Management (as needed)

• Update WordPress websites with new content, promotions, and event information

• Build and update landing pages for campaigns and seasonal initiatives

• Ensure website content is accurate, timely, and aligned with current promotions

Analytics & Reporting

• Assist with tracking performance metrics for
 campaigns and digital content

• Support reporting efforts with clear, organized summaries

Required Skills & Experience

• Experience with graphic design, including Adobe Photoshop or similar tools

• Experience with
 marketing platforms

• Experience working within WordPress or similar CMS platforms

• Basic video editing skills (Adobe Premiere, CapCut, or similar tools preferred)

• Strong written English and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple projects across different brands

• Strong organizational and time management skills



Work Requirements

• Fully remote

• 25–30 hours per week

• Must be available for at least 4 hours per day during U.S. Eastern Time (9am–5pm EST)



How to Apply

Please submit the following:

• A short introduction about yourself

• A portfolio showcasing relevant work (graphic design,
 campaigns, or digital content)

• Your availability (hours per week and preferred schedule)

• Resume and cover letter

title: Go High Level Specialist and Web developer
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role | Stable Pay | Growth Opportunity



We are hiring a Website, Automation, SEO & GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist to join our growing team at Steady Auto Growth.



This role is for someone who enjoys building systems, optimizing websites, improving SEO, and taking clear, direct feedback to continuously improve execution.

Improve SEO fundamentals and on-page structure

Take critical feedback and implement changes efficiently



You will work closely with our internal team to build real business infrastructure that generates leads, improves conversions, and scales.



This role is not for beginners. We are looking for someone who can execute independently, problem-solve, and improve systems over time.



Responsibilities

Create and manage automations (SMS,
, workflows, pipelines, triggers)

Troubleshoot broken workflows, SEO issues, and website errors

Take direct, critical feedback and apply revisions without friction

Requirements



Strong experience with GoHighLevel



Website and funnel building experience



Solid understanding of on-page SEO fundamentals



Experience with workflows, pipelines, tags, calendars, and forms



Comfortable receiving constructive and critical feedback



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable



Able to problem-solve without constant supervision



Coachable, adaptable, and growth-minded



Looking for a long-term role, not temporary or freelance work



Compensation & Benefits



$250–$300 USD per month (40 hours per week)



Long-term, stable employment



Hands-on experience building real business systems



Growth path into a senior automation and SEO systems role



Direct collaboration with leadership



Work that directly impacts client revenue



Work Schedule



Full-time: 40 hours per week



Flexible schedule; deadlines and output matter more than hours



Long-term commitment preferred



About Us – Steady Auto Growth



Steady Auto Growth helps service-based businesses scale using paid ads, SEO-optimized websites, CRM systems, and automation infrastructure.



We focus on building systems that generate leads, book appointments, and increase revenue. Everything we build is designed to be practical, scalable, and measurable.



You will be working on the backend systems that power our clients’ growth.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



To apply, message our Systems Director, Ted, on WhatsApp:



Phone: +1 (339)
Your message must include all of the following:



A short introduction about yourself

Why you believe you are a strong fit for this role

Your GoHighLevel skill level on a scale of 1–5

1 = Beginner



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.



Ready to Build and Optimize Real Systems?



If you are serious about websites, automation, SEO, and continuous improvement, this role may be a strong fit.



Message Ted on WhatsApp to apply and let’s build something scalable together.

title: Reddit Content & Client Success Manager
description:
Novantro is a Reddit Marketing Agency helping B2B companies and agencies generate revenue from Reddit. We are a lean, founder-led team currently doing $50K in monthly revenue and growing fast. That means two things for you: your work has direct, visible impact on the business, and there is real room to grow into bigger roles as we scale.



You'll own day-to-day Reddit execution for our clients: creating posts and threads that rank in Google and get cited by ChatGPT, plus running client onboarding and review calls. You'll work directly under our Head of Reddit / Operations Manager and focus on shipping work, not setting strategy.



What you'll do



Write and publish Reddit content (posts, comments, threads) for client campaigns

Optimize that content to rank in Google and earn citations in ChatGPT / AI Overviews

Research subreddits, transactional keywords, and ranking opportunities before publishing

Run client onboarding calls set expectations, get inputs, kick off the engagement

Run recurring client review calls walk clients through rankings, traffic, wins, and next steps

Track performance and report results back to clients in a clean, repeatable format

Flag risks (removals, mod actions, account issues) to the Head of Reddit



What we're looking for



Active Reddit user who understands subreddit culture, rules, and the difference between content that gets upvoted vs. removed

Strong written English you can write like a real Redditor, not a marketer

Comfortable on video calls with B2B clients (onboardings and reviews)

Working knowledge of how Google ranks Reddit threads and what makes content quotable by ChatGPT



Bonus: experience with Reddit account warm-up, removal recovery, or keyword-ranking projects



Where this role can go

This is a high-leverage seat on a fast-growing team. Strong performers here have a clear path into senior roles as we scale  for example:



Senior Reddit Manager owning strategy across a portfolio of clients and mentoring content producers

Account Lead owning the full client relationship, retention, and expansion revenue

Sales Lead moving into pitching and closing new B2B accounts



We promote from within. The ceiling is set by your output, not your start date.



Application Priority



To be considered first, fill out this application form with your Reddit experience and examples:
