title: Voice-Over Artist for Storytelling
description:
Hello,



My name is Jean-Marc Schwarz and I run two YouTube channels in the finance niche.



We’re building a new YouTube channel centered around captivating storytelling. For this project, we’re looking for a charismatic voice-over artist who can bring stories to life and keep listeners hooked from start to finish.



You’ll narrate a wide range of stories, such as:



POV: You join the Mexican Cartel

Your Life as a Medieval Torturer

Why It Sucked to Be a Samurai

Your Life as Every SWAT Rank

and many more.



The length of the script can range between 8-20 minutes.



????? Your voice will be the heart of the channel. Setting the tone, building suspense, and creating an engaging listening experience.



To begin with, we will aim to post 1–2 videos per week. As the channel grows, the target will increase to up to 7 videos per week.



???? The compensation will be a combination of $5 per script and a 5% revenue share as soon as the channel is monetized. 

Channels in the same niche typically take around 2 months to reach 1,000+ subscribers.



We can discuss a higher base fee for longer scripts (15–20 minutes).



???? What We’re Looking For: 



- A clear, attractive, and expressive voice

- Strong storytelling ability (you know how to pace, pause, and build emotion)

- Natural charisma and personality in your delivery

- Good pronunciation and audio clarity

- Ability to record high-quality audio (minimal background noise)

- Reliability and consistency with deadlines (voice-overs must be completed within 36 hours)



???? How to Apply



Please send:



A brief video introduction about yourself and your experience

A short voice sample (1–2 minutes of storytelling) using the following script: 



POV: You join the Mexican Cartel:



Level One, The Lookout



It starts with a knock you weren’t expecting.



Three slow taps. Then silence.



You already know who it is.



When you open the door, the man doesn’t introduce himself. He doesn’t need to. You’ve seen him leaning against the same black pickup outside the corner store for weeks. Watching. Measuring.



“You want work?” he asks.



You nod before you think.



That’s your first mistake.



By nightfall, you’re standing on a cracked rooftop with a borrowed radio and a prepaid phone that isn’t in your name. The city stretches out in front of you—low buildings, flickering lights, distant sirens swallowed by heat and distance.



Your job is simple.



Watch.



You memorize license plates. You track unfamiliar movement. You report anything that doesn’t belong.



A white sedan circles twice? You call it in.



Two men loiter too long outside the pharmacy? You call it in.



You don’t ask what happens next.



They call you a halcón. A hawk. It sounds important until you realize hawks are disposable.



You get paid 2,000 pesos a week. Cash. Folded into an envelope. No names, no signatures.



You tell yourself it’s temporary.



You tell yourself you’re just watching.



But you start noticing patterns.



The same streets go quiet at certain hours.



Certain cars never get stopped.



Certain names are spoken softly, or not at all.



You begin to understand the rules.



...



I look forward to your applications!



Best regards,

Jean-Marc Schwarz

We are seeking a Digital Marketer that drives brand awareness, website, traffic and sales leads by designing and executing online strategies across social media, SEO/SEM,
, and display advertising. Key responsibilities include analyzing campaign performance metrics, managing advertising budgets, creating content, and optimizing ROI. The digital marketer will use the existing materials and should have a background with healthcare or homecare.



Key Responsibilities

Campaign Management : Planning and implementing paid campaigns on social media (
, LinkedIn, etc.) and Google Ads.

SEO/SEM Optimization : Conducting keyword research, on-page optimization, and SEO strategies to increase organic search rankings.

Content Strategy : Developing engaging content for websites, blogs, and social media platforms.

Analytics & Reporting : Using Google Analytics and other tools to measure traffic, evaluate KPIs, and report on campaign ROI.

 Marketing : Creating and managing
 campaigns to nurture leads and retain customers.

Social Media Engagement : Managing daily social media postings, monitoring engagement, and building community.

Market Research : Analyzing competitor advertising and identifying new market trends.





Required Qualifications

Technical Skills : Proficient in SEO/SEM, Google Analytics, content management systems (CMS) like WordPress, and
 marketing software.

Creativity : Ability to create engaging, consistent and on-brand content.

Data Analysis : Strong ability to analyze web statistics and translate them into actionable insights.

Communication : Excellent written and verbal communication skills for content creation and reporting.

Education/Experience : Typically a degree in Marketing, Communications, or relevant work experience in digital marketing roles.

Photo and Video Editing Skills : Proficient on any tools for photo and video editing.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us

Competitive Base Pay: We offer the highest base pay in the home care industry! 

Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best care possible. 

Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for advancement and learning. 

Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh. 



Ready to Be a Hero? 



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s make a difference together.

title: Customer Services (Calling)
description:
Would you be interested in a full
 Customer Service Representative (Calling) opportunity, with genuine long term stability?



The type of employment where you don't need to worry about losing your job because the work isn't there anymore?



The kind of place which has a phenomenal working culture, a driven leader that treats you as a person, not just another number, and really values your work?



We have built an incredible Filipino team that all exhibit our 3 core values; trust, respect and honesty.



We are very selective over who we hire, as we want people that want to join, and stay with us for the long term.



The spine of our business has been with us for several years; if you are planning to work others jobs alongside this, this role isn't for you.



The most important thing we're looking for in a Customer Service Representative is someone with a great grasp of the English language (both speaking and understanding), an amazing attitude, fantastic organisational skills and ownership/thinking outside of the box.



The kind of person that truly enjoys working as part of a team, has dynamism and a willingness to learn.



The role will be quite bespoke, and full training will be provided.



You will also have a mentor assigned to you specifically for as long as you need.



Above all, you’ll get the opportunity to make a really meaningful impact in a growing business!



The requirement will be for 40 hours a week between Monday and Friday, as well 8 hours between Saturday and Sunday, so 48 hours in total (UK time zone).



If interested, please answer the following (responded however you want is completely fine, and encouraged, but those that don't answer the below won't be considered):



-The monthly salary for this position is $400 (non-negotiable). Does that work?

-Please send an audio note, or even better, a video so I can hear your English.

-How would you rate your English out of 10?

-Please share a CV (resume).

-What is your age?

-Do you have a dedicated working space (no interruption of noise or other people)?

-Do you have 2 monitors and a headset?



We usually receive a large response from candidates, and being honest, favour those that have shown good tenure in previous companies. The people in our team demonstrated tenures in one company of 5-10 years.



So, if this sounds of interest, please respond and we will review your application :)



P.S. Please only apply if you align with our core values, you want to join somewhere for the long-term and you have a good energy and vibes!

title: Remote Chat Representative - Earn up to 2,000 USD and more
description:
Do you love chatting with people and want to turn conversations into real income? Are you excited by the idea of working from anywhere while growing your skills in digital sales? Then this might be the opportunity you have been waiting for.



We are an international remote team running fast growing digital platforms. Our work centers on sales driven communication, strong customer relationships, and high conversion results. To continue our growth, we are looking for ambitious Chat Representatives who want a job that feels flexible, rewarding, and future proof.



Your responsibilities:

You create engaging conversations with customers and guide them naturally toward purchases.

You understand what customers want and use this to increase sales and encourage repeat spending.

You build trust and long term relationships that boost customer value.

You follow clear processes and proven strategies while keeping your own personal style.



Your profile:

You write excellent English and know how to keep conversations flowing in a friendly and persuasive way.

You bring motivation, reliability, and a strong drive to reach goals.

You enjoy flexible working hours and want a job that fits your lifestyle.

Experience in sales or chat-based work helps, but it is not required. We train you to become confident and successful.



What we offer:

Earnings up to 2000 USD per month or more, depending on performance. You have full control over how much you make.

Work one hundred percent remote from any location.

Twenty-two paid days off so you can recharge when needed.

Attractive bonuses when you hit sales targets or boost customer retention.

Real career growth in a supportive and international team that wants you to succeed.

A fast and structured onboarding with everything you need to start earning quickly.

Your potential matters

We look for ambition, energy, and willingness to learn. If you enjoy communicating with people and want to grow both personally and financially, this is your chance. You do not need a perfect CV. You only need the drive to make the most out of this opportunity. Everyone is welcome, no matter your background or experience.



Transparency

Because we receive many applications, we will reach out only to candidates whose profiles fit our current needs. This helps us keep the process fair and efficient.



If this feels right for you, apply now and show us why you would be a great addition to our team. Once you complete all steps, you will receive a response from us within forty-eight hours.

title: Guest Experience Specialist (Seasonal)
description:
Job Title: Guest Experience Specialist - Short-Term Rental Management

Schedule: TBD (EST)

Hours: 20-30 hours a week

Rate of Pay: $4.50



We’re seeking a hospitality-focused and detail-oriented Guest Experience Specialist to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in guest-facing communication, excels at problem-solving in real time, and has a deep understanding of the short-term rental industry. We are looking for someone who is driven by the hospitality industry and serving others. You will be the first point of contact for our guests and a key player in delivering seamless and memorable experiences across our portfolio of properties.



Responsibilities:

Guest Experience (Core Frontline Responsibilities):

- Respond to all guest messages, booking inquiries, and issues via Guesty, Quo, and social channels.

- Monitor smart lock entries and Ring/Minut alerts for early signs of parties, over-occupancy, or lockouts.

- Review and respond to guest reviews using reputation management best practices and AI-assisted tools.

- Update house manuals, digital guides, and listing descriptions to reflect seasonal or property-specific changes.

- Support guests pre-, during-, and post-stay to ensure seamless experiences and maintain our 4.9+ average rating.

- Work cross-functionally with our local ops team to escalate urgent guest or maintenance needs in real time.

- Reach out to past guests for future booking opportunities, including summer and mid-term stays.

- Document systems and processes, and automate as much as possible using AI co-work tools provided

- Live our core values: Provide a clean, comfortable stay, every time. Give a +1 effort everyday. Own your results. Correct the process and the problem. Share positive vibes



Guest Experience:

- Response time under 15 minutes across platforms (Goal: Superhost/Preferred Partner status).

- 4.9+ average review rating maintained across all listings.

- 100% issue resolution within 5–10 minutes of report (lockouts, over-occupancy, tech issues).

- Weekly reporting on feedback trends and potential improvement areas for the property experience.



Requirements:

- At least 1 years of guest communication experience (Airbnb, Guesty, or similar STR platforms or property managers).

- Strong written and verbal English and copywriting skills for guest messaging and calls.

- Comfortable using Slack, Guesty, Google Drive, and remote collaboration tools.

- Self-starter with excellent attention to detail and creativity: Secret Code - S2SGX0501

- Utilize AI to assist in daily tasks and work operations through automation



Roadmap to Success:

First 30 Days:

- Onboard with internal tools and workflows.

- Learn our communication style, brand voice, and guest interaction standards.

- Begin responding to guest messages and supporting stays under supervision.



By Day 60:

- Take full ownership of guest communication during assigned shifts.

- Independently manage review responses and house manual updates.

- Identify patterns in guest inquiries to recommend content or process improvements.



By Day 90 and Beyond:

- Serve as the go-to contact for guest experience needs during assigned hours.

- Proactively resolve issues and anticipate guest concerns.

- Support initiatives that strengthen our commitment to smooth, high-touch stays.



Rate & Schedule: 

Seasonal position 

Rate of Pay:  $4.50

Hours to Work: 20-30 hours a week

Days to Work and Days off: TBD (EST)

Pay Frequency:  Bi-weekly



Subject Line, Please add:  GXS PartTime

Please have an ID score of 70+

Please provide the secret code in the message 

Application Deadline: 5/15/26

title: Full Time Video Editor
description:
We're looking for a Full-Time Video Editor! 



You’re not here to just “edit videos.” You’re here to build attention at scale.



If you’ve ever looked at a YouTube video and thought, “I know exactly why this works”... keep reading.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing:

This role is simple in structure… but high in impact.

You will take raw content and turn it into engaging, optimised, performance-driven videos across: YouTube (long-form) TikTok + Instagram (short-form)



That means:

- Editing long-form YouTube videos that hold attention and drive clicks

- Collaborating with the team to shape video ideas and angles

- Writing/optimising titles, descriptions, and thumbnails with YouTube SEO in mind

- Scheduling and managing uploads

- Repurposing content into short-form clips that people actually watch to the end

- Focusing on highly engaging short-form content (Hooks, Retention time, ASMR etc) 

- Tracking performance and improving based on real data (not guesses)



What We’re Looking For:



We’re NOT looking for a “task editor.” We’re looking for someone who understands WHY content performs.



You should:

- Have experience editing for YouTube (and ideally growing channels)

- Understand YouTube SEO (Titles, CTR, retention, thumbnails etc)

- Know how to structure videos for watch time and engagement

- Be confident creating short-form content that hooks instantly

- Understand key metrics like: Hook rate, Retention time, Drop-off points

- Be able to look at a video’s performance and think: “Here’s what we fix next time.”



If you just follow instructions, this won’t work.

If you think, test, and improve... You’ll thrive here.



What Makes This Role Different:

You’ll be joining a small, fast-moving team that’s scaling quickly.



That means:

- Your work will have a direct impact

- Your ideas won’t get buried in layers of approval

- You’ll grow as fast as you can handle



And here’s the extra bonus:

You’ll have access to the training, systems, and thinking of an 8-figure CMO, meaning you’re not just editing…You’re learning how content actually drives revenue.



We handle production & filming.

Your job is to take what’s created and turn it into high performing video content.



The opportunity....



Right now, you’re either:

Editing videos for an agency or as a freelancer and being told to prioritise quality over quantity.

Or you know you’re capable of more, but don’t have the right environment to thrive.



This role fixes both.



Because when you combine:

- Strong content

- Clear strategy

- And someone who understands performance…Growth stops being random.



Don’t send a generic application.



Complete the questions below, and be sure to include:

Examples of YouTube videos you’ve edited (with results if possible)

Your portfolio of short form content

A quick breakdown of: What makes a video perform in your opinion



We’re not hiring based on CVs.

We’re hiring based on how you think.

title: Sentinel Power User - 3 Screens required
description:
We are migrating safety-critical worker profiles from the UK Rail Sentinel database to our private management system. This role requires extreme speed, multitasking, and absolute precision. We are looking for "Power Users" who maintain a high-efficiency workstation.



Hardware Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



 * Triple Screen Setup:* You must have at least three monitors (e.g., Laptop + 2 Monitors or a 3-Desktop Monitor setup). This is essential for managing the source database, destination system, and communication tools simultaneously.

 *High-Speed Internet:* Minimum 25 Mbps with a stable backup connection.

*Compensation (Output-Based):*

We pay for results and efficiency. Top performers in this role earn significantly above the local hourly average.

  *$0.40 USD* per Initial Profile Migration (Est. 5 mins).

 *$0.10 USD* per Monthly Maintenance Update (Est. 1 min).

 *Weekly Payouts* processed via Wise.



*Quality Control & Accuracy Policy:*

Because this data involves rail safety, there is zero room for error.



 * Accuracy Penalty:* To ensure high standards, a deduction of *$0.80* (2x the initial entry rate) will be applied for every inaccurate profile (e.g., wrong date, typo in name, or missed competency).



 *Training:* We provide a brief paid trial/training period where these penalties are waived while you learn the system.



*Requirements:*

 * Native or near-native English proficiency.

 * Proven experience in high-volume data migration/entry.

 * Exceptional multitasking skills (managing multiple databases across screens).

 * High reliability for ongoing, daily work.



### Why work with us?

We value high-performing professionals and provide steady, long-term work with fast weekly payouts. If you have the hardware and the speed, this is a highly lucrative position.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Meta Ads / Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts)

•?  ?Creativity

•?  ?Understanding of short-form content and ads

•?  ?Communication and reliability



If successful, there will be ongoing weekly work available.



Please only apply if you believe you are a superstar in this area and believe your skills are as good as anyone out there, we are looking to work with someone long term and want top quality.

title: Video Editor
description:
Remote Video Editor 

Location: Remote

Type: Freelance (Ongoing Work)



About the Role

We are seeking a skilled and reliable Video Editor to support a fast-growing and high-volume digital content operation supporting brands across varying industries.



You will work with pre-recorded content from local internal teams, transforming them into high-quality, engaging, and platform-optimised videos across multiple social media and educational platforms.



This is a structured role suited to someone who thrives on consistency, deadlines, and delivering polished work at scale.



Platforms

You will be editing content for:

- Websites

-
 (Stories, Reels, Posts)

- Instagram (Stories, Reels, Posts)

- TikTok (Short-form videos)

- YouTube (Long-form & Shorts)

- LinkedIn (Video content)

- Skool (Educational videos)

and other platforms that may become available.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit short-form and long-form video content

- Cut, sequence, and refine raw footage into engaging, platform-ready content

- Add captions/subtitles with strong readability and accuracy

- Apply clean transitions, pacing, and structure suited to each platform

- Select and balance audio, music, and voice for clarity

- Repurpose long-form videos into short-form content

- Format videos to meet platform specifications (aspect ratio, duration, resolution)

- Maintain consistent branding, tone, and visual style

- Deliver content based on a set content calendar and deadlines

- Manage multiple video edits simultaneously

- Ability to adapt style across different types of content (educational, promotional, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

- Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro / Final Cut Pro / CapCut (or similar)

- Proven experience in video editing for social media platforms

- Strong understanding of platform formats, trends, and best practices

- Ability to work efficiently under deadlines

- High attention to detail and consistency

- Reliable, organised, and responsive



What Success Looks Like

We are looking for someone who can:

- Deliver a consistent, high volume of quality content

- Produce clean, engaging edits with minimal revisions required

- Demonstrate strong understanding of pacing, hooks, and platform optimisation

- Maintain consistent quality across all content

- Meet turnaround expectations and manage multiple projects effectively

- Contribute to improving content quality and workflow efficiency



Remuneration

This role will be compensated with an ongoing fortnightly retainer and generous tiered bonuses based on outputs.

title: SEO / PPC Specialist
description:
We’re a results-driven creative agency helping brands grow through strategic digital marketing, compelling content, and high-performing online experiences. We’re looking for a skilled SEO Specialist to elevate our clients’ visibility, rankings, and organic performance.





What You’ll Do



Conduct keyword research, competitive analysis, and SEO audits

Optimize on-page SEO elements (titles, meta tags, headers, content, links)

Develop and implement SEO strategies tailored to each client

Improve site structure, internal linking, and user experience for SEO impact

Monitor performance using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush/Ahrefs

Provide monthly reports with insights, results, and recommendations

Collaborate with the content and design teams to ensure SEO best practices

Stay updated on industry trends, algorithm updates, and emerging tools





What We’re Looking For



Proven experience in SEO (agency experience is a plus)

Strong understanding of technical, on-page, and off-page SEO

Familiarity with SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, Screaming Frog, etc.)

Ability to analyze data and translate it into actionable insights

Knowledge of content marketing and how it supports SEO

Strong communication and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines





Bonus Points



Experience with local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization

Background in website optimization (Core Web Vitals, speed, etc.)

Basic understanding of WordPress, Shopify, or Webflow

Ability to collaborate with content writers and designers effectively



Good Luck!

title: Local SEO & Google Business Profile Specialist for UK Cleaning Company
description:
We are looking for an experienced Local SEO and Google Business Profile Specialist to help our UK cleaning company rank higher on Google, improve our website visibility, and push our Google Business Profile to the top positions in our local city.

Our goal is clear: we want to appear above our local competitors when people search for cleaning services in our target areas.

You must understand local SEO, Google Business Profile optimisation, website ranking, competitor research, keyword strategy, citations, reviews, on-page SEO, and local service area optimisation.

This is not a basic VA role. We need someone who can analyse our competitors, create a clear ranking strategy, and execute the work properly.

Main Responsibilities

You will help with:

Optimising our Google Business Profile

Improving our ranking in Google Maps

Improving our website ranking for local cleaning keywords

Researching our local competitors

Finding what competitors are doing better than us

Creating a clear Local SEO strategy

Optimising service pages on our website

Improving title tags, meta descriptions, headings, and local keywords

Building location-based SEO pages

Improving website content for cleaning services

Optimising images with correct file names and alt text

Creating Google Business Profile posts

Suggesting review strategies to improve trust and ranking

Building local citations and directory listings

Checking NAP consistency: name, address, and phone number

Improving internal linking on the website

Tracking keyword rankings and progress

Creating monthly SEO reports

Helping us rank for searches such as “cleaning services Derby”, “domestic cleaning Derby”, “house cleaning Derby”, “cleaners near me”, and similar local keywords

Requirements

Please only apply if you have real experience with:

Local SEO

Google Business Profile ranking

Google Maps SEO

Website SEO

Keyword research

Competitor research

On-page SEO

Local citations

Service area businesses

Review strategy

SEO reporting

WordPress or website builders

Google Search Console

Google Analytics

SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, SurferSEO, BrightLocal, Local Falcon, Whitespark, or similar

Home services SEO experience is a big plus

Cleaning company SEO experience is a huge plus

The Person We Are Looking For

We need someone who is:

Strategic and analytical

Experienced with local SEO

Able to show real ranking results

Honest about what can and cannot be done

Able to explain the SEO strategy clearly

Consistent with execution

Detail-oriented

Good at competitor analysis

Focused on real results, not vanity metrics

We do not want someone who only says “I can rank you number 1” without a clear plan.

We need someone who can look at our city, our competitors, our website, our Google Business Profile, and create a serious action plan to help us grow.

Important

To apply, use the word SEO725 in the subject line.

In your application, please include:

Your experience with Local SEO

Your experience ranking Google Business Profiles

Examples of businesses you helped rank on Google Maps

Examples of websites you helped rank locally

Before and after results, screenshots, case studies, or proof of results

Your experience with home services, cleaning companies, or local service businesses

The SEO tools you use

What you would check first to improve our ranking

Your expected monthly rate

Your availability in UK time

Applications without proof of previous SEO results will not be considered.

Work Type

Remote position

Part-time to start

Long-term opportunity for the right person

Must provide weekly updates

Must be able to track ranking progress

Must have strong communication and attention to detail

About Us

We are a growing premium cleaning company based in the UK. We provide high-quality cleaning services for homeowners, families, and local clients.

We want to dominate our local area on Google by improving our website ranking, Google Maps ranking, and Google Business Profile visibility.

We are looking for someone serious, experienced, and results-driven who can help us rank above our competitors and bring in more quality leads.

title: PPC Expert
description:
Job Title: Amazon PPC Specialist

Location: Remote 

Employment Type: Full-time 



About the Role



We’re looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Expert to manage and scale advertising campaigns across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display. This role requires someone who understands Amazon’s algorithm, bidding strategies, keyword harvesting, and how to optimize ACOS and TACOS for steady, profitable growth.



Responsibilities



Create, manage, and optimize campaigns in Amazon Advertising Console (SP, SB, SD)



Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and search term optimization



Build and refine campaign structures (auto, manual, research, performance, ranking, defense, etc.)



Monitor daily performance and adjust bids, budgets, and targets to improve ACOS/TACOS



Run ranking campaigns and product launch strategies



Create and manage negative keyword lists to reduce wasted spend



A/B test ad types, placements, creatives, and strategies



Prepare weekly performance reports and provide strategic recommendations



Collaborate with product, creative, and operations teams



Requirements



1–3+ years of hands-on Amazon PPC experience



Deep understanding of Amazon Advertising Console, DSP experience is a plus



Proven history of lowering ACOS and scaling profitable campaigns



Strong skills in keyword research and campaign restructuring



Data-driven mindset with strong analytical abilities



Experience with tools such as Helium10, Jungle Scout, Pacvue, Perpetua, or similar



Ability to work independently and deliver results on schedule

title: Real estate VA
description:
Summary

Real Estate Virtual Assistant – Part-Time

We're a real estate investment company doing fix-and-flip rehabs and buy-and-hold rentals. We need a reliable, experienced VA to keep the back office running smoothly.



This is not an entry-level role. If you've done this before, keep reading.

- Material orders & back office admin

- Scheduling — inspections, walkthroughs, appraisals

- Bookkeeping

- Calendar &
 management

- General tenant magment

- Closing coordinator

---

title: Import & Logistics Coordinator (Remote – Philippines)
description:
About Us:

We are a UK-based eCommerce brand specializing in international sourcing and online retail. We are seeking an experienced Import & Logistics Coordinator to manage supplier coordination, international shipments, and end-to-end import processes into the UK.



Key Responsibilities:

Coordinate international shipments, primarily imports into the UK

Liaise with freight forwarders, suppliers, and customs brokers to ensure smooth operations

Prepare and review shipping documentation, including commercial invoices, packing lists, and HS codes

Track shipments proactively and resolve delays or issues efficiently

Calculate landed costs, including duties, VAT, and shipping expenses

Ensure compliance with UK import regulations and documentation requirements



Requirements:

Proven experience in import/export, freight forwarding, or international logistics

Strong understanding of shipping terms and Incoterms (e.g., FOB, EXW, CIF)

Experience working with international suppliers (China/Asia preferred)

Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

High attention to detail with a proactive, problem-solving mindset



Nice to Have:

Experience supporting eCommerce operations (e.g., Amazon, Shopify)

Knowledge of UK customs procedures and import compliance

Familiarity with freight platforms, shipping tools, or ERP systems



Working Hours:

Flexible; must have partial overlap with UK business hours for coordination



Application Instructions

To be considered, please include:



1. A brief summary of your import/logistics experience

2. A specific example of a shipment you managed (include challenges and how you resolved them)

3. Tools or software you have used (e.g., freight platforms, ERPs, tracking systems)

4. Include the word “LOGISTICS” in your subject line



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

title: NDIS Finance Manager
description:
Senior Accounts Clerk 

A growing group operating across healthcare and service-based industries is seeking an experienced Senior Accounts Clerk to take ownership of day-to-day financial operations across multiple entities.



This is a hands-on, high-responsibility role suited to someone confident managing both Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable end-to-end, with minimal supervision.



This is a purely operational accounting role focused on bookkeeping and finance support.



About the Role



You will be responsible for maintaining financial accuracy and driving efficient processes across multiple companies. This role requires someone who can take initiative, problem-solve independently, and manage competing priorities across different business units.



Key Responsibilities



- End-to-end management of Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable across multiple entities

- Daily bookkeeping and accurate coding of transactions in Xero

- Raising, issuing, and managing high-volume invoicing

- Ownership of collections, aged receivables, and payment follow-ups

- Liaising with NDIS Plan Managers (invoice submissions, payment tracking, issue resolution)

- Performing bank, credit card, and account reconciliations

- Maintaining clean, accurate, and up-to-date financial records

- Managing supplier payments, expenses, and reimbursements

- Supporting payroll preparation (timesheet verification and coordination)

- Identifying discrepancies and resolving issues proactively

- Assisting with internal reporting and financial summaries

- Streamlining and improving finance processes where possible



To be considered, you must demonstrate:



- 3+ years experience in an Accounts Clerk, Bookkeeping, or similar finance role

- Strong, hands-on experience with Xero (essential)

- Proven experience with transaction coding, reconciliations, and invoicing workflows

- Experience managing full AR/AP functions independently

- Experience working across multiple entities or business accounts

- High attention to detail with strong accuracy

- Confidence handling collections, payment follow-ups, and client queries

- Strong organisational skills and ability to meet deadlines

- Ability to work autonomously and take full ownership of your role



What We Offer



- Stable, long-term role within a growing multi-entity organisation

- Opportunity to take ownership of finance operations across multiple businesses

- Direct exposure to management and business operations

- Supportive environment with clear systems and expectations

- Performance-based incentives and career growth opportunities

- Flexible work-from-home arrangements



If you are an experienced Accounts professional with strong Xero and invoicing expertise, looking for a role where you can take ownership and make an impact, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Building MEP Engineer - Canada
description:
Canadian real estate development company | Residential building systems | $2,500-3,000 CAD/month for consistent performers



—



WHY JOIN US



Fully remote, permanently. No hybrid, no return-to-office. Work from anywhere.



Predictable hours. 8am-4pm AST means 8am-4pm. No late-night
s, no weekend emergencies.



Clear output = clear reward. No politics, no annual review games. Finish projects well, earn more.



Flat organization. 15-person team of professionals like you. Direct access to leadership. Your ideas get heard.



Continuous training. Collaborative mentality, knowledge sharing, grow your skills without bureaucracy.



—



WHO SHOULD APPLY



If you currently work at (or recently left) Arup, AECOM, Jacobs, WSP, Meinhardt, Aurecon, Stantec, Beca, or Forsspac - this role is for you.



Must have: Direct experience on US or Canadian residential/commercial building projects. You understand ASHRAE, NFPA, and North American MEP documentation standards.



Best fit: Multi-family residential, mixed-use buildings, mid-rise construction. You've designed HVAC, electrical, and plumbing systems for buildings - not industrial plants or data centers.



Not a fit: Process/industrial MEP engineers, or pure CAD drafters. We need someone who sizes equipment, runs load calculations, and produces permit-ready MEP documentation.



—



YOUR WORK



Design mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems for residential buildings

HVAC load calculations and equipment sizing

Electrical panel schedules, lighting layouts, and power distribution

Plumbing riser diagrams and fixture layouts

Produce permit-ready MEP drawings in Revit

Coordinate with architectural and structural disciplines

4-10 projects/month at steady state



—



REQUIREMENTS



2+ years at a global consultancy working on US or Canadian building projects

Licensed engineer (Mechanical, Electrical, or equivalent)

MEP design experience - you've sized systems and run calculations, not just drafted

Revit MEP proficiency for design and documentation

Familiarity with ASHRAE, NFPA, NEC, or equivalent international standards



—



COMPENSATION AND CONDITIONS



Top performers: $2,500-3,000 CAD/month

Structure: $1,600 base + $
per project

Schedule: Full-time, AST 8am-4pm (8pm-4am Manila)

Time off: Weekends off, one paid vacation day per month

Probation: 1 month



—



HOW TO APPLY



Respond with answers to all five questions. Qualified candidates get one 30-minute interview and immediate onboarding.



1. Employer and Role

Current/recent firm, your job title (mechanical, electrical, or plumbing focus), and years there.



2. US/Canada Project Experience

Two residential or commercial building projects you designed MEP systems for US or Canadian clients. Include: location, building type, which systems you designed (HVAC, electrical, plumbing), your deliverables.



3. Technical Question

A 6-unit residential building in a cold climate needs heating. Walk me through how you'd approach the HVAC system selection and sizing. (3-4 sentences)



4. Schedule

Type "YES I CAN COMMIT" for AST 8am-4pm full-time.



5. Portfolio and Start Date

Links to resume and 2-3 MEP drawing sets or calculation sheets you produced. How soon can you start?

title: Claude Code Expert
description:
Location: Fully Remote (PH)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (with flexibility as needed for client impact events)



About T3 Tech Partners

T3 Tech Partners is the team MSPs rely on when challenges exceed Tier 2 or internal expertise. We operate as a Fractional Tier 3 partner, delivering advanced Microsoft 365, cloud, security, and AI engineering expertise to MSPs supporting diverse client environments.



We build and operate AI-powered applications that automate the most time-consuming parts of MSP work — tenant management, reporting, security reviews, and migrations. Our stack runs on DigitalOcean and is powered by the Anthropic API.



Role Overview



We are seeking a senior AI Application Engineer to design, build, and operate production applications powered by the Anthropic API. You'll own the backend services, integrations, and infrastructure that turn Claude into reliable, multi-tenant tooling for MSPs and their clients.



This is a hands-on engineering role. You'll write the code, ship the features, deploy the services, watch the dashboards, and tune the prompts. You should be equally comfortable architecting a tool-use loop against the Messages API, debugging a Node service on a DigitalOcean droplet, designing a Postgres schema for multi-tenant isolation, and explaining cost trade-offs to leadership.



Key Responsibilities

Anthropic API & AI Application Development (Core Focus)



Design and build production applications on top of the Anthropic API — Messages, tool use, streaming, prompt caching, batch processing, the Files API, and MCP connectors where appropriate.

Architect multi-turn agentic workflows, tool-use loops, and structured-output pipelines that hold up against real customer data, not just demos.

Implement robust prompt and context engineering practices: system prompt design, dynamic context assembly, retrieval, and output validation.

Build evals and regression suites so prompt and model changes don't silently degrade behavior in production.

Optimize for cost and latency at scale: prompt caching strategies, model selection (Haiku vs. Sonnet vs. Opus), batch processing for non-realtime workloads, and token budgets per tenant.

Implement guardrails: input validation, output verification, rate limiting, abuse detection, and safe handling of customer data.



Backend & API Engineering



Build and maintain backend services in Python and/or Node.js/TypeScript, exposing clean REST or RPC APIs to internal tools, partner integrations, and end-user products.

Design multi-tenant data models in PostgreSQL with proper tenant isolation, encryption, and audit logging.

Integrate with the Microsoft Graph, Google Workspace Admin SDK, and MSP platform APIs (SuperOps, Hudu, and similar) to feed Claude with the right context and act on its outputs.

Implement authentication and authorization (OAuth 2.0, OIDC, app registrations, service principals) across Microsoft and Google identity ecosystems.

Design background job systems, queues, and webhook handlers for long-running AI workflows.



DigitalOcean Infrastructure & Operations



Own the deployment, scaling, and operations of our application stack on DigitalOcean — Droplets, App Platform, Managed Databases (Postgres, Redis), Spaces, VPCs, and load balancers.



Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions or similar) for automated testing, deployment, and rollback.

Containerize services with Docker; manage configuration, secrets, and environment promotion across dev/staging/prod.

Implement observability: structured logging, metrics, request tracing, and AI-specific telemetry (token usage, latency, eval scores, cost per tenant).



Maintain backup, disaster recovery, and security baselines for production workloads.

Harden services for the realities of running customer-data-handling apps: TLS, secret rotation, dependency hygiene, and least-privilege IAM.



Integration with MSP & Microsoft 365 Workflows



Build integrations against the Microsoft Graph and Google Workspace Admin SDK to power AI features over real tenant data — mailboxes, drives, identities, devices, and policies.



Develop and maintain PowerShell components where Microsoft tooling demands it, and bridge cleanly back to the main backend.



Support T3's product work (including T3nant Wiz) and internal MSP delivery tooling with shared services and libraries.

Work with the rest of the team to identify high-leverage automation opportunities and ship them.



Engineering Discipline



Write clean, tested, reviewed code. Treat AI-generated code as a draft to be read, not output to be trusted.

Maintain meaningful test coverage — unit, integration, and AI-output evals.



Participate in code review, design discussions, and post-i
 reviews.

Document architecture, runbooks, and operational procedures so the team can support what you build.





Availability & Support Expectations



Standard working hours are 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST.

Some flexibility is required for production deployments, i
 response, or critical client work outside normal hours.

This role is not on-call, but responsiveness during critical events is expected.





Qualifications

Required Experience



5+ years of hands-on backend or full-stack engineering experience shipping production applications.

Demonstrable production experience building applications on the Anthropic API or directly comparable LLM APIs (OpenAI, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock). You should be able to walk us through real systems you've built — tool-use loops, streaming UIs, evals, cost optimizations, and the trade-offs behind each.

Strong Python or Node.js/TypeScript for backend service development.

Solid PostgreSQL experience: schema design, query tuning, migrations, multi-tenant patterns.

Production experience deploying and operating services on DigitalOcean (or directly comparable IaaS — AWS, Azure, GCP, Linode, Hetzner).

Strong Linux, shell, and command-line fluency.

Solid Git and modern software engineering hygiene (PRs, code review, CI/CD, testing).

Working knowledge of HTTP, REST, OAuth 2.0, and webhook patterns.

Excellent native-level English communication skills, both written and verbal.



Strongly Preferred



Hands-on experience with prompt caching, batch API, tool use, and the Files API in production.

Experience building or evaluating AI evals in production environments.

Experience with the Microsoft Graph and/or Google Workspace Admin SDK.

PowerShell proficiency for Microsoft 365 administration.

Experience with Docker, GitHub Actions, and modern deployment tooling.

Familiarity with MSP platforms (SuperOps, Hudu, ConnectWise, Datto, or similar).

Prior experience handling customer data under compliance frameworks (CMMC, HIPAA, SOC 2).

A public GitHub presence or portfolio of AI applications you can share.



How You Work



You read AI output critically. You don't ship code you haven't understood.

You think about cost, latency, and failure modes from day one — not as an afterthought.

You're comfortable saying "this shouldn't be AI" when that's the right call.

You can drop into an unfamiliar codebase or API and get useful work done without hand-holding.

title: Inventory Data Analyst
description:
Position Summary

We are looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented Inventory Data Analyst to support inventory management

across multiple warehouse locations in multiple states.

This role will focus on reviewing inventory data, pulling reports, building and maintaining Excel spreadsheets, identifying

inventory issues, and helping the company make smarter purchasing and inventory allocation decisions.

This person will play a key role in helping reduce inventory on hand, identify dead stock and overstocked items, support

equipment purchasing projections, improve cycle count accuracy, and find warehouse process issues through data.

The ideal candidate understands inventory movement, cycle counting, purchasing controls, warehouse transactions,

and how inventory decisions impact cash flow and operational efficiency. They should also be comfortable using AI

tools, checklists, and structured reporting processes to improve accuracy, speed, and consistency.



Key Responsibilities

Inventory Reporting & Data Analysis

• Pull and review inventory reports from company systems.

• Build, maintain, and improve Excel spreadsheets for inventory tracking, purchasing projections, cycle counts, usage

trends, and location-level inventory performance.

• Analyze inventory usage by location, product category, time period, and warehouse.

• Identify trends in inventory consumption, overstocking, understocking, slow-moving inventory, and dead stock.

• Create reports that help leadership make better purchasing, transfer, and stocking decisions.

• Use AI tools, when appropriate, to summarize findings, organize data, build reports, and improve workflow efficiency.

• Complete recurring reporting checklists to ensure inventory reviews are accurate, consistent, and completed on time.

Inventory Forecasting & Purchasing Projections

• Create purchasing projections for equipment and materials based on historical usage, sales trends, seasonality, and

company growth plans.

• Forecast purchasing needs anywhere from one month to one year in advance.

• Support inventory planning during periods of rapid company growth and expansion.

• Help determine what inventory should be purchased, when it should be purchased, and where it should be allocated.

• Assist in keeping purchasing within approved inventory benchmarks and company targets.

• Identify when inventory should be transferred between locations before new purchasing is approved.



Inventory Optimization

• Review inventory on hand across multiple locations and identify opportunities to reduce excess stock.

• Identify dead stock, slow-moving items, and overstocked inventory.

• Recommend inventory transfers between locations to avoid unnecessary purchasing.

• Help reallocate inventory across warehouses and states based on demand, usage, and upcoming needs.

• Work with leadership to minimize total inventory on hand while still supporting field operations.

• Help create clear reports showing what inventory should be used, transferred, reduced, or reordered.



Warehouse Accuracy & Cycle Count Support

• Review cycle count data and identify locations or items with high variance.

• Help keep cycle count variance within company benchmarks.

• Identify potential warehouse process issues through data, including incorrect cycle counts, incorrect inventory

transactions, missing transfers, over-purchasing, inventory received or consumed incorrectly, items sitting too long

without movement, and inventory levels that do not match actual usage.

• Flag concerning trends to operations leadership, location managers, and warehouse coordinators.

• Help identify whether issues are coming from process breakdowns, transaction mistakes, counting errors, or purchasing

decisions.



Cross-Functional Support

• Work with Location Managers and Warehouse Coordinators to reduce inventory on hand.

• Help identify and correct transaction mistakes that affect inventory accuracy.

• Provide reporting and recommendations to support better inventory controls.

• Communicate findings clearly and professionally to operations teams.

• Support leadership with data needed for purchasing decisions, warehouse accountability, and inventory strategy.

• Use checklists to track follow-up items, recurring reports, warehouse issues, and inventory action items.



Required Skills & Experience

• Strong Excel skills, including formulas, pivot tables, filtering, sorting, and large data set management.

• Experience pulling reports, reviewing data, and organizing information into clean, usable formats.

• Ability to complete and maintain checklists to ensure reporting, inventory review, and follow-up tasks are completed

consistently.

• Experience using AI tools to improve efficiency, analyze data, summarize findings, build reports, create checklists, and

support daily workflow.

• Experience with inventory reporting, warehouse data, purchasing, or supply chain analytics.

• Ability to analyze inventory usage, dead stock, overstock, and purchasing trends.

• Strong attention to detail and ability to identify errors in data.

• Ability to build clean, organized reports that are easy for leadership to understand.

• Strong communication skills and ability to work with multiple teams remotely.

• Ability to work independently and manage recurring reporting deadlines.

• Must have a reliable computer and internet connection.

• Must be available to work 8:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time.



Preferred Experience

• Previous experience in a similar inventory data analyst, purchasing analyst, supply chain analyst, or warehouse reporting

role.

• Experience using AI tools to improve reporting, data review, checklist completion, task tracking, and operational follow-up.

• Experience building and following structured checklists for recurring reports, inventory reviews, purchasing projections,

cycle counts, and warehouse audits.

• Experience working with multi-location inventory operations.

• Experience supporting HVAC, construction, distribution, warehouse, or field service operations.

• Experience with inventory systems, purchasing systems, or ERP platforms.

• Experience creating purchasing forecasts or demand planning reports.

• Familiarity with cycle counts, inventory transfers, warehouse transactions, and inventory variance tracking.

• Experience working with remote teams across different locations or time zones.



Success Metrics

Success in this role will be measured by the ability to:

• Reduce excess inventory on hand.

• Identify dead stock and overstocked items.

• Improve purchasing accuracy and forecasting.

• Help keep cycle count variance under company benchmarks.

• Identify warehouse transaction mistakes through data.

• Support inventory transfers before unnecessary purchases are made.

• Provide accurate and timely reports for operations leadership.

• Help Location Managers and Warehouse Coordinators make better inventory decisions.

• Build repeatable reporting processes using Excel, AI tools, and checklists.

• Help improve inventory accountability across multiple locations.



For interested candidates, please
 your resume to 
 with a subject line: Inventory Data Analyst_Applicant

title: Real Estate assistant

title: Product Sourcer
description:
Olvy is a fast-growing Dutch e-commerce brand selling premium home appliances across Amazon EU, 
, Kaufland and other marketplaces. We are expanding aggressively and are building a team that operates independently and at scale. We move fast, work structured, and hold high standards across everything we do.



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Product Sourcer who will own our product research and supplier pipeline. You will take input from our CEO (category, target specs, target price) and independently source the best options from Alibaba and other platforms. You will also track and follow up on all potential products from trade fairs such as Canton Fair, compare suppliers, and deliver clear overviews so we can make fast, informed decisions.



This is a key role in our growth. We are launching new products every quarter and we need someone who can keep up with that pace and bring structure to the process.



What You Will Do



• Search Alibaba and other sourcing platforms based on input from our CEO (category, specs, target price)

• Identify the most distinctive and well-designed product options per category and compare them on specs, quality and pricing

• Track all potential products from trade fairs (Canton Fair and others) in a structured pipeline

• Set up and maintain a clear product comparison overview per category: specs, pricing, MOQ, supplier reliability

• Follow up with suppliers, request samples, and collect quotes

• Flag standout designs and products with commercial potential beyond just the cheapest option

• Report back to CEO with a decision-ready overview



What We Are Looking For



• Proven experience in product sourcing or procurement, preferably in consumer goods or e-commerce

• Strong eye for product design and what makes a product stand out in a competitive market

• Excellent command of Alibaba, 1688, and similar platforms

• Highly structured and organised, able to manage multiple product pipelines simultaneously

• Strong communicator in English, both written and spoken

• Proactive, self-directed and able to work without daily guidance

• Experience working with European or Western e-commerce brands is a strong plus



What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience

• Part-time position, 20 hours per week, with the possibility to grow to full-time as we scale

• Direct collaboration with the CEO

• A fast-growing company where your impact is immediately visible

• Room to grow in salary and responsibility as the company scales



How to Apply



Send your application with “Olvy” at the beginning of your subject title, along with a short introduction, your relevant experience, and examples of products you have sourced or compared in the past. Show us how you think and how you work.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Recruitment Consultant - Maritime - Singapore & APAC
description:
About Eyonzy



Eyonzy is a specialist maritime recruitment consultancy operating across the full spectrum of the global maritime industry — ship management, offshore oil and gas, offshore wind, naval architecture, marine engineering, and maritime operations. We work with owners, operators, managers and contractors to place high-calibre technical and commercial professionals into roles that matter.



We are growing our international presence and are looking for a driven, commercially minded recruitment consultant to lead our APAC desk from Singapore — one of the world's most important maritime hubs.







The Opportunity



This is a true 360 role. You will build and own your own desk — developing client relationships with shipowners, ship managers, offshore operators and maritime businesses across the APAC region, while simultaneously sourcing and managing candidates from the regional talent pool. You will not be handed a warm desk; you will build one, with the support of an experienced team and an established brand.



Singapore is the world's busiest port, home to the world's leading ship management companies, one of the most active LNG and tanker markets, and a growing hub for offshore energy and maritime technology. This role gives you direct access to that ecosystem.





Key Responsibilities



Business Development

- Identify and target shipping companies, ship managers, offshore operators and maritime service providers across Singapore and the broader APAC region (focusing on Singapore, Hong Kong, South Korea, Japan, Malaysia, India, Australia)

- Build and maintain relationships with hiring managers, HR leads and C-suite decision makers at target clients

- Pitch Eyonzy's services through direct outreach, networking, industry events and referrals

- Negotiate and agree terms of business with new clients

- Develop a pipeline of repeat business by delivering consistently strong results



Candidate Management

- Source, approach and build relationships with maritime professionals across the APAC region — including officers, engineers, naval architects, marine superintendents, technical managers and commercial specialists

- Conduct thorough candidate interviews and assessments; prepare compelling candidate submissions

- Manage candidates throughout the recruitment process — briefing, interview preparation, offer management, onboarding support

- Build a talent network relevant to the region's key sectors: bulk carriers, tankers, container shipping, LNG, offshore support, ship management



Search Execution

- Manage the end-to-end delivery of live searches — from brief to placement

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all client and candidate activity

- Provide clients with market intelligence, salary benchmarking and hiring advice relevant to APAC

- Hit and exceed monthly, quarterly and annual revenue targets



What We're Looking For



Experience

- Minimum 2 years' experience in 360 recruitment or business development, ideally within maritime, shipping, offshore or a closely adjacent technical sector

- Demonstrable track record of business development and fee generation

- Experience working within or alongside APAC maritime markets is strongly preferred



Knowledge

- Understanding of the maritime industry — vessel types, rank structures, certification requirements (STCW), shore-based career pathways

- Awareness of key shipping hubs and employers across APAC — Singapore, Hong Kong, South Korea, Japan

- Familiarity with visa and right-to-work considerations across the region



Personal Qualities

- Self-starter who can build a desk from the ground up without constant oversight

- Commercially driven with a consultative approach — you advise, you don't just transact

- Resilient and persistent; comfortable with the long-game nature of building a specialist market

- Culturally aware and able to build trust across diverse business cultures in the region

- Excellent communicator — written and spoken English essential; Mandarin, Cantonese, or Bahasa an advantage



Practical

- Working hours aligned to Singapore time (SGT / UTC+8)

- Willingness to travel within the region for client and candidate meetings



What We Offer



- Competitive base salary commensurate with experience

- Uncapped commission — the APAC desk is yours to build and profit from

- Full autonomy over your desk, clients and strategy — with senior support

- Access to Eyonzy's global candidate network, tools and research capability

- Direct line to the Managing Director — no bureaucracy, fast decisions

- Genuine career progression as the APAC operation grows

- The chance to be the first name in maritime specialist recruitment in a region that is underserved by genuine sector specialists



About the Role Structure



This is an autonomous, entrepreneurial position. You will be working remotely from Singapore, aligned to SGT business hours, with regular contact with the UK leadership team. You will be expected to attend industry events in Singapore and travel within the APAC region as the desk develops.

Paid weekly

high-level English, high-level charisma, and high-level results.

Sunday to Thursday: 3 hours/day (Evening shift)



Can be flexible with exact shift hours and days



Total: 16 hours of work per week.



The Role: 50% Appointment setting on Dating apps / 50?min Paperwork  Photo Editing AI



The "Dating Assistant" Role (Primary): You will manage Hinge profiles like a pro and dating apps like a pro You’ll use DeepSeek and other AI tools to screenshot and continue the conversation. A/B test which photos and openers get the best response. We are going to build an automated machine where you, optimize the English, and secure dates.



The "Airbnb Specialist" Role: You’ll learn my systems for Airbnb and 
. You’ll be responsible for uploading new listings and ensuring every guest feels like they’re staying in a 5-star hotel. Using a property channel management tools.



The "Daily Strategist": You are my right hand. You plan my day, use AI to automate your own tasks, and keep me "one step ahead" of everything.



Why You?



You are obsessed with AI. You don’t just use it; you want to see how far it can go.



You have a Sales Mindset. You don't just "message"; you "close." you love earning extra!



You are Very Organized. You hate mess and love systems.



You have Ownership. If an Airbnb listing needs a 5-minute fix on a Saturday, you jump on it because you care about the result.



The "Billion Dollar" Perks:



Direct Coaching: I will personally coach you on high-level British English and AI prompting.



Bonuses: I want you to make money when I make money. Every successful appointment you set comes with a cash bonus.



WORKING STYLE:



The 60-Day Sprint: We’ll use Hubstaff for the first 30–60 days as "training wheels." Once you hit your KPIs (e.g., 3 dates/week, 100?min accuracy), we move to a Results-Based Model. I won't care if you work 1 hour or 3 as long as the results are "billion-dollar level," you have total autonomy and freedom to do your thing.



The Output Agreement: Use AI and automation to your heart's content to speed up your work EXCEPT for sensitive apartment contracts and legal documents. Those tasks must be done manually by you to ensure total privacy and zero errors. So you need to still be able to edit, be good at photoshop / editing manually to an average level.



Mistake Ownership: If a listing error happens, I expect you to jump in for 5–10 mins to fix it, regardless of the hour. Once you master the system, this shouldn't be necessary.







HOW TO APPLY:



Tell me about the hardest project you have done online,



Have you worked in Sales before, or what is the hardest thing you had to sell.

title: Video Editor
description:
Part-Time Video Editor Needed — 5-15 hrs/week



Hi! I'm hiring a video editor for our personal injury law firm in Alabama, USA.



What you'd edit:

- Footage from our videographer (more polished, longer-form)

- Quick phone clips from our attorney (short-form social content)

- Mostly vertical video for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and



Hours: 5-15 per week, flexible. Some weeks lighter, some heavier.



The catch: Sometimes we need REALLY fast turnaround. If a big local event happens and we want to post about it, we may send you a clip and need it back same-day or within a few hours. If that's a deal-breaker, this isn't the right role. If you thrive on quick wins, you'll love it.



Must have:

- Premiere Pro, DaVinci, or CapCut proficiency

- Excellent captions (we use a lot of them — viewers watch on mute)

- Good ear for pacing on short-form content

- Strong English (American English, including legal terms)

- Reliable internet and a system that won't crash on a 4K timeline



Bonus:

- Motion graphics / After Effects

- Experience with law firms or professional services

- Thumbnail design



Hiring process:

1. Submit application (details below)

2. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a  PAID TRIAL EDIT — we'll send you a real clip from our attorney, and you'll have 48 hours to turn it around. We pay $25 USD for the trial regardless of whether we move forward.

3. If the trial edit is a strong fit, the candidate with the best work product will become our captive video editor. This will result in a permanent part-time job of 5-15 hours per week. 



The trial isn't a test of how fancy your effects are — it's how well you understand pacing, captions, and what makes someone stop scrolling. Show us your judgment, not just your software skills.



To apply, send:

1. Portfolio link (especially short-form work)

2. Your hourly rate (USD)

3. Your time zone and weekly availability

4. One sample edit you're proud of, with a sentence on why



No portfolio = no response. Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Appraisal Coordinator
description:
Appraisal Coordinator 

Remote | Full-Time



About the Role

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-driven Appraisal Coordinator to manage the end-to-end coordination of appraisal orders in a fast-paced, high-volume lending environment.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in structured workflows, communicates clearly and confidently via
, and can juggle multiple moving parts without losing accuracy. You will serve as the central hub between internal teams and external vendors, ensuring every appraisal progresses smoothly, on time, and with full visibility.



If you enjoy process-driven work, proactive follow-ups, and bringing order to complex operations—this role is for you.



What You’ll Own

You will take full ownership of the appraisal coordination lifecycle—from order placement through final report delivery—by:



Driving clear, consistent communication across vendors and internal stakeholders

Maintaining accurate, up-to-date tracking systems

Proactively managing timelines, documentation, and follow-ups





Key Responsibilities

1. Appraisal Order Coordination



Receive and review loan details from internal systems

description:

 automations).

mbers.

WHO YOU ARE

HOURS

• Flexibility required for availability outside of working hours as needed.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 
.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

. When you find a real lead, you log it in our Google Sheet with a link, a short summary, and a quote from their post.

 and
 user (you understand how these platforms feel)

title: DME Intake Coordinator and Respiratory Therapist (RT)
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking multiple candidates to join our fast-paced DME team. Roles include DME Intake Coordinators and Respiratory Therapists (RTs) focused on patient compliance and education. All positions require DME experience (respiratory equipment preferred) and working knowledge of Medicare Part B coverage & documentation guidelines. Experience with Brightree software is essential.

________________________________________

Common Requirements (All Positions)

• DME experience required – respiratory equipment preferred, but any DME accepted

• Knowledge of Medicare Part B coverage – must understand coverage criteria and documentation requirements

• Familiarity with Medicare documentation guidelines for DME coverage

• Brightree software experience (in any capacity – intake, billing, or clinical documentation)

• Attention to detail – critical to prevent order and billing errors

• Ability to maintain accurate records, document all interactions, and ensure proper data entry

• Teamwork, prioritization, and efficiency in a high-volume setting

________________________________________

Role 1: DME Intake Coordinator (Non-Clinical)

Key Responsibilities

• Process incoming referrals from CRMs, faxes, and calls in a fast-paced environment

• Review documentation for Medicare compliance and verify insurance information

• Obtain authorizations as needed

• Contact doctors’ offices to secure missing information/documentation

• Coordinate equipment delivery with patients/families

• Add patient information to Brightree for delivery and billing; save all documentation to account

• Maintain internal delivery tracking report

• Handle incoming calls from patients, doctors’ offices, and referral sources

• Manage call volume efficiently while providing excellent customer service

• Multi-task and prioritize effectively across multiple platforms

Required Skills

• Medical insurance and authorization knowledge

• Strong attention to detail

• Team collaboration

________________________________________

Role 2: Respiratory Therapist (RT) – Compliance & Patient Support

Key Responsibilities

• Monitor patients on PAP devices daily via compliance software

• Maintaining contact with patient on Oxygen to follow up with current use doctor's appointment for continued use

• Document all patient and physician interactions in compliance software and Brightree

• Make outbound calls and take inbound calls to address mask/equipment issues, troubleshooting, and compliance barriers

• Obtain compliance download reports, input into billing software (Brightree), and submit to referring physicians

• Contact patients to ensure follow-up physician appointments are scheduled and met

• Follow up with physician offices for face-to-face visit notes

• Coordinate patient resupply issues with PAR and resupply teams

• Act as patient representative to ensure documentation and compliance standards are met for therapy success

• Educate patients on cleaning, maintenance, and proper use of PAP equipment per prescription

• Contact doctors’ offices to secure missing information/documentation for all other orders

Required Credentials & Experience

• Currently licensed Respiratory Therapist

• Minimum 1 year hospital or clinical experience

• Minimum 1 year in an environment communicating verbally with English-speaking patients (preferably healthcare delivery)

• Familiarity with sleep apnea, HME and related supplies preferred

• Working knowledge of Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word, Excel) and internet browsing

Soft Skills for RT Role

• Well organized, detailed follow-through, sense of urgency

• Empathetic listener who tailors communication to varied audiences

• Works well under stress and maintains positive relationships

• Handles multiple tasks in fast-paced environment

• Anticipates challenges and sees big-picture impact of decisions

________________________________________

To Apply

Please specify which role you are applying for: DME Intake Coordinator or Respiratory Therapist (RT) . Indicate your experience with Medicare Part B, Brightree, and DME (especially respiratory if applicable).
 resume to 
 AND

title: SEO & Web Design Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)

I’m looking for an experienced SEO & Web Design Specialist to support and improve live client websites. This is a hands-on, part-time role suited to someone who can confidently manage technical SEO, keyword research, and WordPress updates from day one.



You’ll be working across real projects, not test sites. Strong attention to detail and the ability to execute cleanly without constant supervision are essential.

Technical & On-Page SEO

 • Identify and resolve issues in Google Search Console (indexing, coverage, page experience, Core Web Vitals)

 • Handle basic technical SEO tasks (broken links, redirects, crawl issues)

 • Configure and maintain Yoast SEO (or equivalent) correctly across sites



WordPress & Performance

 • Build, edit, and optimise pages in WordPress

 • Confidently work with page builders such as Divi and/or Elementor

 • Improve page speed (image optimisation, layout efficiency, Core Web Vitals)

 • Ensure changes are correctly applied across desktop, tablet, and mobile





Required Skills & Experience

 • Proven, hands-on experience in SEO (not theory-only)

 • Strong working knowledge of Google Search Console

 • Confident use of Ahrefs

 • Solid experience with WordPress

Nice to Have (Bonus)

 • Experience with service-based or local SEO websites





Working Arrangement

How to Apply

 1. A short introduction and your relevant experience

title: Housing & Community Outreach Specialist (Remote)
description:
Job Overview



Seeking a professional, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support both housing intake and community outreach efforts for an independent living housing program. This role focuses on property inquiries, landlord communication, and building referral relationships with social service organizations.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable on the phone, highly organized, and able to manage structured outreach and documentation.



Core Responsibilities

Housing Intake & Property Outreach



- Call property listings on HotPads and similar platforms

- Communicate with landlords and property owners

- Ask qualifying questions related to property suitability

- Verify basic property requirements

- Schedule property viewings when appropriate

- Take clear, detailed call notes

- Update housing intake and property tracking spreadsheets



Community & Referral Outreach



- Contact social service agencies and case management organizations

- Introduce the independent living housing model

- Build and maintain referral relationships

- Collect and document key referral contacts

- Schedule informational or follow-up meetings

- Maintain accurate outreach and relationship notes



Organizations You Will Contact



- Local VA offices

- Mental health centers

- Vocational rehabilitation programs

- Homeless transition and reentry organizations

- Disability support networks



Outreach Script Framework



“Hi, I’m calling about housing options for independent adults with stable income.

We provide housing for individuals who are cognitively aware, ambulatory, and receiving guaranteed monthly income.

I’d love to connect with the right person to explore whether a referral partnership could make sense.”



Required Skills & Qualifications



- Strong U.S. English accent and professional phone presence

- Excellent verbal and written communication

- Ability to take detailed, organized notes

- Comfortable making outbound inquiry and outreach calls

- Basic Excel / Google Sheets skills

- Reliable internet connection

- Quiet, distraction-free work environment

- Available during standard U.S. business hours



Ideal Candidate Traits



- Organized and process-driven

- Detail-oriented and consistent

- Comfortable following scripts and SOPs

- Professional, calm, and confident on the phone

- Able to switch between structured tasks and relationship-based outreach



Position Type



- Remote

- Part-time or Full-time (based on availability)

- Long-term opportunity with growth potential

title: Amazon SEO and Copywriting Specialist
description:

We are hiring a full-time Amazon SEO and Copywriting Specialist to produce high-quality, optimized product content across a large catalog of SKUs. The ideal candidate is analytical, creative, and experienced in Amazon listing optimization.

- Research product features, benefits, and target audiences to produce clear and customer-focused copy
