- Apply SEO and PPC best practices to improve product discoverability and organic ranking

- Ensure all content is optimized for targeted keywords to maximize search visibility and conversion rates

- Work closely with the PPC team and other departments to ensure messaging is consistent and product information is accurate

- Review performance metrics and customer feedback and use findings to improve content quality over time

- Monitor Amazon algorithm updates, SEO trends, seasonal shifts, and competitor activity



Mandatory Skills:

- At least 2 years of experience in SEO, copywriting, or digital marketing

- Excellent written English with strong grammar and attention to detail

- Analytical mindset with the ability to use data to guide content decisions

- Solid understanding of keyword research and Amazon SEO best practices

- Proactive problem-solver who can work independently and manage priorities

- Comfortable working at speed across a high volume of product listings

- Dependable and detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Good communication and collaboration skills for working in a remote team



Preferred Skills:

- Direct experience writing and optimizing Amazon product listings

- Working knowledge of Helium 10 or similar Amazon optimization tools

- Portfolio or examples of Amazon listings with strong ranking or sales results

- Proven results in growing organic traffic or improving keyword rankings on Amazon

- Experience handling content for a large and varied product catalog

- Quick to adapt to new platforms, tools, and process changes



Why Join Us:

Be part of an international e-commerce business where your content work has a direct and measurable impact on product performance across multiple Amazon marketplaces. You will have the opportunity to apply your SEO and copywriting skills at scale, working on a wide range of products and categories. If you are passionate about writing that ranks and converts, this is the role for you.

description:
Full job description

About HK 24-BPO



HK 24-BPO is a growring company in customer experience management, digital engagement, and technology solutions. With over 2 years of experience, 50+ tea
mbers, we obsess about our clients by providing remarkable customer experiences for the world’s most innovative brands.



About the Job



We are currently hiring Inbound Work from Home Customer Service Representatives!



Are you a problem solver? Do you like making meaningful connections with people? Are you interested in a rewarding career working with the world’s most exciting brands from the comfort and safety of your own home?



Our Work from Home Customer Service Representatives are passionate about delighting customers by making every interaction an unforgettable experience - whether that’s through inbound calls,
s and/or chats. We want people with personality, who love making an impact with every customer interaction.



We also want people with drive and ambition - people who want a career, not just a job. Punctuality, performance and positivity will set you up for success!



Note: All applications, interviews, orientation, and training will be done virtually.



Benefits of Working as a Work from Home Customer Service Representative:

Work from home!

Flexible schedules

Competitive salary

Amazing career growth opportunities



Working as a Work from Home Customer Service Representative, You Will:

Assist all customers through inbound calls,
s, and/or chats.

Communicate a variety of information to the customer.

Be an active listener and help resolve customer inquiries.

Provide a meaningful and positive experience with every customer interaction.

Learn and retain a thorough working knowledge of all existing and new products and services.



Working as a Work from Home Customer Service Representative, You Have:



1year – 2 year of customer service experience.

Great communication skills, both verbal and written.
